name: webapp-freedom
description: Claude Code plugin for full-stack web app development. Stack-agnostic (React/Vue/Svelte frontend; Node/Python/Go backend) — picks stack at scaffold time, remembers via STACK.md. Four agents (product-research, data-model, api-design, frontend+backend impl) plus skills for planning, scaffolding, adding endpoints/pages, E2E tests, and deploys.
